title: Single, §121 home sale exclusion ($300k gross gain)
description: Software developer sells primary residence after 7 years for $300,000 gain. Single filer's §121 exclusion is $250,000. Engine excludes $250k; remaining $50k flows to LTCG (Sch D). FL no state tax.
expectations: Federal tax on LTCG portion at 15% (within single bracket)
